jobs.purpose: Orchestrates a campaign send. Loads the audience, batches subscribers, dispatches per-batch send jobs.
steps: Load campaign + issue + audience.
Refuse if newsletter.state IN (paused, throttled, archived).
Load cached_subscriber_ids from audience; if stale (> 1h), dispatch synchronous BuildAudienceSegmentJob first.
Filter subscribers: state=active only.
Update campaign counters.targeted = len(subscribers) + state=in_progress.
Chunk into batches of campaign.send_batch_size.
For each batch: dispatch SendNewsletterIssueBatchJob with throttle_per_second respected via job delay.
Await batch chain via Bus::chain — on last batch complete, transition campaign state=completed.
jobs.notes: Failure at orchestration level transitions campaign to failed; the batch-level jobs continue independently (per-recipient failure is expected + non-fatal).

jobs.purpose: Send an issue to one batch of subscribers via notifications-mail.
steps: For each subscription_id in batch:
Check MailSuppression via notifications-mail::MailSuppressionRegistry — skip + count as suppressed if hit.
Check NotificationPreference for marketing.newsletter — skip + count as opted_out if disabled.
Render issue body via notifications-mail template renderer + inject issue.variables + issue.content_blocks.
Inject List-Unsubscribe headers with subscription.unsubscribe_token URL.
Dispatch notifications-mail::SendMailJob with metadata { newsletter_id, campaign_id, subscription_id, issue_id }.
Update campaign.counters.sent atomic increment.

jobs.purpose: Evaluate audience.expression against NewsletterSubscription + refresh cached_subscriber_ids.
steps: Load audience + expression.
Query NewsletterSubscription filtered by expression + newsletter_id + state=active.
Order deterministically (id asc).
Update audience.cached_subscriber_ids + cache_refreshed_at.
Fire NewsletterAudienceRefreshed.

jobs.purpose: Import subscribers from a CSV upload. Requires consent evidence column.
steps: Stream CSV rows.
For each row: validate email + consent_evidence + tags.
Skip rows where email is already subscribed (idempotent).
Skip rows where email is on MailSuppression list.
Create NewsletterSubscription with source=imported + skip double-opt-in (assumption: import list is already consented; the consent_evidence column proves it).
Report per-row outcome to storage as import_report.csv.

jobs.purpose: Export subscribers to CSV. Uploaded to storage module + signed URL returned.
Recompute engagement_score for a subscription. Called from open/click listeners.
steps: Load subscription.
engagement_score = min(100, floor(recent_opens * 1 + recent_clicks * 5 + weeks_active * 0.5))
Weight recent activity higher via exponential decay over 90 days.

jobs.purpose: Monthly reputation report per newsletter. Aggregates campaign-level counters into rolling averages + surfaces thresholds proximity. Emailed to newsletter owner.
Two prunes: pending_confirmation older than confirmation_ttl_hours → soft delete; active-but-unengaged for > 365d → flag for admin review (never auto-delete).
Async confirmation processing when caller hits GET /confirm/{token}. Validates token + transitions state.
